# Replication Data for: European power grid clustering

Authors: Gosztolai, Adam
Published: 2021-06-28T15:24:48Z
Subjects: Mathematical Sciences, Physics
DOI: doi:10.7910/DVN/8ZWOXQ

Multiscale clustering of the European power grid network using the geometric modularity algorithm.

Citation: Gosztolai, Adam, 2021, "Replication Data for: European power grid clustering", https://doi.org/10.7910/DVN/8ZWOXQ, Harvard Dataverse, V1
